summary: Two LANE-2 reviewers were dispatched for relay 061 within ~6 minutes of each other (parallel pwsh PID 26620 at 17:55:08 JST + this session implied at 18:01:45 JST). Concurrent partial deposit at sessions/2026-05-06/T1-SYNTH-SUBSTITUTE-LANE2-051-Q1Q2Q4/ has 3 files (anchor_shas.md + independent_substrate_verification.md + adoption_audit.md, totals 25892 bytes), corresponding to STEPS 1-3 of relay 061. STEPS 4-9 not yet present in folder.
spec_text_relevant: relay 061 §HALTS line: 'HALT_061_DUPLICATE_LANE2 (P5 fail)' + §PRECONDITIONS P5 line: 'No prior LANE-2 review at sessions/<any-date>/T1-SYNTH-SUBSTITUTE-LANE2-*/. HALT_061_DUPLICATE_LANE2 if found.'
spec_text_ambiguity: The word 'prior' literally implies pre-existing-before-this-session. A CONCURRENT review (parallel agent still running) is technically not 'prior'. However, the spirit of P5 is 'do not produce duplicate LANE-2 verdicts', and a concurrent reviewer satisfies that intent more strongly than a stale prior deposit. This session interpreted 'concurrent partial deposit + still-alive parallel pwsh' as triggering HALT_061_DUPLICATE_LANE2.
downstream_impact: If parallel agent completes successfully, no impact to W20 SIARC pipeline; that LANE-2 deposit becomes canonical for picture v1.20 + bt_baseline_note v1.x + Phase 3 dispatch + rule5 amendment + PCF-2 v3.x scope.
If parallel agent stalls (no writes for >10 min from now), operator should fire option B and re-dispatch.

Without an operator decision, NO LANE-2 verdict is canonical — Item 1-6 adjudications remain unresolved, blocking picture v1.20 absorption + bt_baseline_note v1.x revision drafting + T1 Phase 3 dispatch authorization.
non_blocking_observations: Bridge git HEAD at halt time: df7d6d4 (synth-substitute deposit; clean working tree apart from the 3 untracked LANE2 files from parallel agent).
P2/P3/P4 preconditions all PASS independently of P5; the substrate is in good shape for whichever LANE-2 dispatch ultimately wins.
This session did NOT contaminate the concurrent LANE2 folder (no edits, no reads of body content, only directory listing + SHA-256 hash + file metadata).
